{{Infobox technique
| name = Shadestep
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shadestep]] is a technique on the sixth page of the Book of Eternal Night that allows one to slip through space using shadow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shadestep]] is a technique used by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shadestep]] is a technique used to break through hulls.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] used [[Shadestep]] to close the distance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
